summary:
All tests pass. 

**The needle:** In `/app/app/CsvReader.java`, the CSV file was being read using `ISO-8859-1` charset instead of `UTF-8`. Since the CSV file (`customers.csv`) contains UTF-8 encoded international characters (like `Renée Duböis`, `Hans Müller`, `María García`, `Søren Kirkegård`, etc.), reading it with `ISO-8859-1` corrupted all the non-ASCII characters in the output report.

**The fix:** Changed `Charset.forName("ISO-8859-1")` to `Charset.forName("UTF-8")` in the `CsvReader` constructor, so the charset matches the actual encoding of the CSV file and the output writer in `ReportGenerator` (which already correctly used `StandardCharsets.UTF_8`).
